flags.summary: 100%-time completion at CEM College-San Juan fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (39.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at CEM College-San Juan fell 72% between 2021 and 2024 (71.4% → 20.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 28 pp at CEM College-San Juan vs the 2018–2022 baseline (25.8% vs 53.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at CEM College-San Juan rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($4.2k → $5.0k).
